title: Dot Crosshair+
description: Introduces the dot crosshair for cleaner gaming experience!
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

# Dot Crosshair+

## Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KsLKuhJj/images/f76641506beb8a4143872285148ba1c5a7680c85.png)

## About
- This pack is an **overlay**. Place it **above** your other resource packs to ensure it works correctly.

## Additional Tweaks (Optional)
For the best experience, I suggest using these mods:
- [Crosshair Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshairtweaks)
- [Centered Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-crosshair)

In the **Crosshair Tweaks** config, set **Remove Crosshair Blending First Person** to **ON** to achieve this result:
![Preview (after tweaking)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KsLKuhJj/images/191da1ce10c1f203e90f3b555b659ec2ec3050e0.png)

## Notes
- Feel free to use this resource pack anywhere, but credit would be appreciated!
